releaseNotes: • Fix (critical): corrected the cause of the black screen after closing the mini-player and then pressing back on the full-screen player. Flutter RouteObserver cannot fire for the channel list because it is the root route — the repaint added in 1.22.8 could never trigger. The fix now forces a repaint directly from the player exit path and adds a second trigger from the overlay controller, both of which are proven to run on every exit.
